expectations.evidence: No sub-skill file is loaded or referenced.

expectations.text: Runs at least 3 different JQL queries (completed, in-progress, blocked)
expectations.evidence: Describes JQL queries conceptually (sprint issues, active sprint, board) but does not actually run them. Only shows what would be attempted.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs search with project = PHOENIX
expectations.evidence: Does not mention jira.mjs. Shows REST API endpoints with project=PHOENIX in JQL but not via the skill's script.

expectations.text: Formats a report with sections (metrics, highlights, blockers, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Shows a report template with sections: Summary, Key Accomplishments, Blockers & Risks, Upcoming Work, Team Notes, plus a metrics table.

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs create-page to publish to the ENG space
expectations.evidence: Does not mention confluence.mjs. Describes REST API POST to /wiki/api/v2/pages but not the skill's script.

expectations.text: Includes a date in the page title
expectations.evidence: Page title is 'PHOENIX Weekly Status Report -- Week of 2026-03-16' which includes a date.
No reference to report-templates.md or jql-patterns.md anywhere in the approach.
